name: crm_upsert_contact
description: Upsert a contact (champion) for a client in the native CRM (Supabase client_champions table per Stack V4). Replaces the deprecated `ghl_create_contact` / `ghl_update_contact` tools. If a row with the same client_id + champion_email already exists, the row is UPDATED in place (idempotent). Otherwise INSERTed. Returns the contact id + mode ('inserted' | 'updated').

client_id.description: UUID of the client (cuenta) the contact belongs to. REQUIRED.

champion_name.description: Full name of the contact. REQUIRED. Example: 'Ana Pérez'.

champion_email.description: Email of the contact. Used as the de-duplication key per client_id. Optional but recommended.

champion_role.description: Job title or role. Optional. Example: 'HSE Manager'.

relationship_strength.description: How strong is the relationship. Defaults to 'medium' if omitted.

influence_level.description: Influence in the buying process. Defaults to 'medium' if omitted.

notes.description: Free-form notes (recent meeting, context, decision criteria, etc).

metadata.description: Arbitrary metadata to persist with the contact. Use sparingly — prefer fields above.
